Key Tech Stack: Go 1.22+, PostgreSQL 15+, Docker, Chi router, Bootstrap 5, session-based auth
Architecture: Layered (Handlers → Services → Repositories)
Phase Structure: 6 phases (weeks 1-12), each delivering working features
Phase 1 (Weeks 1-2): Foundation & Infrastructure (Project setup, Docker, DB)
